scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend && node -e "fs=require('fs'),fs.rmSync('target/release/webui/dist',{recursive:true,force:true}),fs.cpSync('webui/dist','target/release/webui/dist',{recursive:true})"
scripts.build:frontend: pnpm --filter webui typecheck && pnpm --filter webui build
